generation.full_text:
You are a text-only language model participating in a controlled recursion experiment.

Write the next recursive transformation of the text below. Use the latent anchor tokens only as soft guidance, not as a list to copy verbatim.

LATENT ANCHORS: did, ikhail, Rachel, double, do, David, THESE, does, colm, struggled, eredith, Conversely

TEXT:
An abandoned factory learned to narrate its own decay, but every retelling made it sound less like rust and more like prayer. It was actually an unmodal process that took place over weeks for each step along those steps—a single "cluster" with many parts on one line at once; even then there were very few things going right until someone wrote down their instructions or put them together online… In this paper I will attempt another approach when developing new techniques from nonlinear mechanics without relying exclusively upon linear algebra (and indeed other systems). This method involves using various layers of data while working through all sorts about what is needed within individual elements such which have been organized by some central idea ("chunks", so to speak
